meta.title: Construction in Barcelona | Patrimonial - Renovations, New Builds & Refurbishment
meta.description: Construction, full renovations and building refurbishment in Barcelona with over 20 years of experience. Free, no-obligation quote.

home.heroSub: Full renovations, new builds and building refurbishment with the discipline of an architecture studio and the rigour of a construction firm with 20 years in the city.
home.manifiestoText: We don't just do works. We give back to Barcelona the buildings that have supported it for a century, with the same standards with which they were raised.
home.serviciosTitulo: Three ways to care for a building.
home.procesoTitulo: Our own method, tailored to each service.
home.procesoIntro: Pick a service and see the exact phases we deliver it in, from the first visit to handover.

proceso.texto: Building survey, pathology assessment and management of permits and paperwork with the owner or property administrator.
Costed report, proposed solutions and an estimated schedule within 7 working days.
Coordination with the architect, document management and council paperwork.
In-house crew on site, a dedicated site manager and weekly photo reports to the client.
Final tests, building logbook and two-year warranty on our work.

home.portfolioTitulo: A decade restoring Barcelona, building by building.
home.portfolioFinalTitulo: The whole portfolio is waiting for you.
home.mapaTitulo: All of Catalonia, based in the Eixample.
home.mapaTexto: An in-house team operating across Barcelona city, with coordinated travel across the four provinces. Average response time: 48 hours.
home.testimonioMega: «Three renovations in five years. Deadlines met, budget respected, communication impeccable. It's the closest thing I've seen to hiring a trusted architect friend.»
home.faqTitulo: What you ask us before we begin.

faq.q: How long does a full renovation in Barcelona take?
faq.a: An average 80 m² home is delivered in 10-14 weeks from contract signing, including permit processing and final tests.

faq.q: Do you work with residents' associations?
faq.a: Yes. Over 60% of our portfolio is refurbishment of façades, roofs and common areas for property administrators and residents' boards.
Yes. We process Next Generation EU funds, accessibility subsidies and council tax reductions for energy improvements.

faq.q: Do you offer financing for private clients?
faq.a: We offer 0% financing up to 24 months through a partner bank, subject to approval.

faq.q: Are you authorised to remove asbestos?
faq.a: We are registered with RERA, with a certified crew and full insurance for removal and transport to an authorised landfill.

faq.q: How is the budget controlled during the works?
faq.a: Every additional item is approved in writing before being executed. No surprises in the final invoice.

home.ctaFinalTitulo: Tell us which building you want to look after.
home.ctaFinalSub: We respond within 48 hours with an initial assessment and a proposed site visit.

servicios.dropdownTagline: One in-house team across all 8 disciplines. No subcontractors.
servicios.titulo: Construction, renovation and refurbishment services in Barcelona
servicios.subtitulo: Full renovations, new builds, refurbishment and specialist works with an in-house team of 38 professionals.
servicios.manifiestoEyebrow: One team · from architect to locksmith
servicios.manifiestoTexto: We don't subcontract what we know how to do. Each discipline has its own site manager and one single person who answers to you.
servicios.detailTrabajosSubtitulo: Real projects for this service, delivered in Barcelona.

reformas.descripcion: We carry out full and partial renovations in homes, offices and commercial premises. Authorised, registered installers for gas, electricity, water and more. Asbestos removal.
reformas.descripcionLarga: At Patrimonial we specialise in full renovations in Barcelona. We take care of the entire process, from design to final execution, including gas, electricity, water, telecoms and HVAC installations. Our installers are authorised and registered, ensuring the highest quality and full compliance with current regulations. We also carry out partial renovations tailored to each client's needs and budget, whether in private homes, offices or commercial premises.
destacados: Design and execution by the same team, no middlemen.
In-house, registered installers for gas, power, water and HVAC.
Full renovations or single-trade jobs, tailored to you.
Asbestos removal included when the building requires it.

fases.descripcion: Permits and paperwork.
Layout, materials and a fixed costed report before work starts.
Masonry, installations, tiling and carpentry coordinated by a site manager.
Snagging, site clean-up and a joint walk-through with you.

obraNueva.descripcion: We deliver new-build construction projects for office buildings, homes, commercial premises and more, from start to finish.
obraNueva.descripcionLarga: We deliver new-build projects from start to finish. From foundations to finishes, we coordinate every trade and phase of construction: structure, masonry, MEP installations, flooring, claddings and carpentry. We work on residential buildings, offices, commercial premises and industrial facilities, always honouring the agreed schedule and budget.
destacados: One point of contact from foundations to the keys.
Architecture, structure and installations coordinated under one team.
We work on residential, offices, retail units and industrial buildings.
Fixed schedule and budget from the executive project onward.

fases.descripcion: Permits and paperwork.
Coordination with the architect and structural calculations.
Earthworks, foundations and load-bearing structure.
Installations, claddings, carpentry and turnkey handover.

rehabilitacion.descripcion: Full refurbishment of buildings, façades, entrance halls, pavements and more. Rope access, structural reinforcement and beyond.
rehabilitacion.descripcionLarga: We are experts in the full refurbishment of buildings in Barcelona. We carry out work on façades, entrance halls, communal staircases, roofs and rooftops. Our team specialises in rope access, structural reinforcement and the consolidation of construction elements, ensuring the safety and durability of every intervention.
destacados: Façades, entrance halls, staircases and roofs of occupied buildings.
Rope access and structural reinforcement by our own team.
Direct coordination with residents' associations and property managers.
Work scheduled to minimise disruption for residents.

fases.descripcion: Permits and paperwork.
Inspection of defects and a scope-of-work report.
Façade, roof or common areas, coordinated with the community.
Final review and after-care follow-up.

instalaciones.descripcion: Authorised, registered installers for every type of installation: electrical, plumbing, natural gas and HVAC.
instalaciones.descripcionLarga: We have authorised installers for every type of installation in homes, offices and commercial premises. We handle electrical, plumbing, natural gas, air conditioning and heating installations, always meeting current regulations and providing the necessary certificates and bulletins.
destacados: In-house, authorised installers across all 4 trades.
Official certificates and bulletins included with every job.
Electrical, plumbing, natural gas, air conditioning and heating.
Installations adapted to current regulations in renovations and new builds.

fases.descripcion: Permits and paperwork.
Load calculations, routing and applicable regulations.
Fitted by authorised installers for each trade.
Legalisation, certificates and function tests.

amianto.descripcion: A RERA-registered firm for the safe, legal removal of asbestos-containing materials in any kind of building.
amianto.descripcionLarga: We are registered with the Spanish Asbestos Risk Companies Register (RERA) and have all the training and equipment required for the safe removal of asbestos-containing materials. We manage the whole process: assessment, work plan, removal, transport and disposal at authorised landfills, ensuring the safety of workers and neighbours.
destacados: Registered with RERA (Spain's Asbestos Risk Companies Register).
Team trained and equipped under Royal Decree 396/2006.
Transport and disposal at authorised landfills with full documentation.
We handle every permit with the labour and public health authorities.

fases.descripcion: Permits and paperwork.
Material inspection and a work plan filed with the labour authority.
Dismantling by certified crews under strict safety protocols.
Disposal at an authorised landfill with full paperwork.

trabajosVerticales.descripcion: Work on façades, roofs and hard-to-reach areas using rope-access techniques.
trabajosVerticales.descripcionLarga: Our team is trained and certified to carry out rope-access work on façades, roofs, light wells and any hard-to-reach area. This technique allows us to work on buildings without scaffolding, reducing cost and time. We carry out façade repairs, waterproofing, painting, the installation of protection nets and anchor points.
destacados: Certified rope-access technicians.
No scaffolding: lower cost and shorter execution time.
Façades, roofs and light wells with difficult access.
Installation of permanent lifelines and protection nets.

fases.descripcion: Permits and paperwork.
Assessment of anchor points, façade and hard-to-reach areas.
Safe rigging of the vertical access.
Repair, cleaning or painting with a final report.

refuerzos.descripcion: Consolidation and reinforcement of structures: beams, columns, slabs and foundations using the most advanced techniques.
refuerzos.descripcionLarga: We carry out structural reinforcement studies and projects for buildings showing pathologies or being adapted to new uses. We work with techniques for reinforcing beams, columns, slabs and foundations, using materials such as carbon fibre, epoxy resins, steel sections and shotcrete.
destacados: Prior structural survey signed off by a qualified engineer.
Reinforcement of beams, columns, slabs and foundations.
Solutions for structural defects or a change of building use.
Structural monitoring after the intervention.

fases.descripcion: Permits and paperwork.
Inspection, calculations and reinforcement report.
Intervention on beams, columns, slabs or foundations.
Verification of structural performance and final documentation.

impermeabilizacion.descripcion: Professional waterproofing of flat roofs, rooftops and terraces.
impermeabilizacion.descripcionLarga: We offer professional waterproofing solutions for flat roofs, rooftops, terraces and balconies.
destacados: Solution matched to each roof type: accessible, flat or pitched.
Prior check of drains and slope condition.
Two-year warranty on the intervention.
Also available for private balconies and terraces.

fases.descripcion: Permits and paperwork.
Condition of slopes, drains and damp patches.
Executed with the technique suited to each roof.
Watertightness test and written warranty.

sobreNosotros.descripcion: A full-service real-estate firm with expertise in heritage management and over 20 years of experience.
sobreNosotros.contenido:
From day one, at Patrimonial we have been dedicated to offering an end-to-end service in construction, renovations and building refurbishment in Barcelona. Our philosophy is built on closeness with the client, transparency in budgets and the highest quality in every job we deliver.

Our clients include a large number of property administrators, architects, industrial firms, businesses and private individuals who trust our experience and professionalism.

We have a team of qualified professionals across every construction discipline: masonry, electrical, plumbing, gas, HVAC, painting, carpentry and rope access. All our installers are authorised and registered.

We are registered with RERA (the Spanish Asbestos Risk Companies Register) and hold the certifications required to undertake any kind of construction work.

valores.subtitulo: The principles behind every project we sign.
items: Professionalism and discipline on every project
Closeness and constant communication with the client

casa.metaTitle: Custom Homes in Barcelona and Catalonia
casa.metaDescription: We build custom homes in Barcelona and Catalonia: design, permits and construction with a single team, from the plot to the keys in hand.
casa.heroTitulo: We design and build the home you want to live in.
casa.heroSub: From the first idea to the handover of the keys, we design and build unique homes tailored to your lifestyle, with a transparent, considered and fully personalised process.
casa.manifiestoEyebrow: One project · one team · one home
casa.manifiestoTexto: Building a home isn't applying a catalogue. It's translating how you live into square metres, light and materials — and standing behind it with a team that answers to you, not to a subcontractor.
casa.porqueTitulo: One point of contact, from the land deed to the keys.
destacados: Architecture and construction under one team, with no friction between firms.
We handle the new-build permit and every council procedure.
In-house crew on site: structure, installations and finishes, no subcontractors.
Fixed budget from the executive project onward, no surprises at completion.
casa.procesoTitulo: From plot to keys, in five phases.

proceso.texto: Architecture, layout and a costed report.
Structural calculations and the new-build permit application.
Installations, claddings, carpentry and turnkey handover.

galeria.subtitulo: Turnkey new-build projects. Swipe through them and open any one to see its full details.

casa.faqTitulo: Before you build, let's clear this up.

faq.q: How long does it take to build a home from scratch?
faq.a: An average-sized single-family home, from permit to key handover, usually takes 12 to 18 months depending on size and site complexity.

faq.q: Can I build on any plot of land?
faq.a: It depends on the zoning and local council regulations. In the project audit we check buildability and constraints before any design work starts.

faq.q: Do you handle the new-build permit?
faq.a: Yes. We file the executive project and the council permit, and coordinate the technical inspections through to the occupancy certificate.

faq.q: Can I bring my own architect?
faq.a: Yes. We can build from an already-drafted project, or coordinate the design with our own in-house architecture team from scratch.

faq.q: Can the budget change during construction?
faq.a: The budget is fixed against the executive project. Any later change is approved in writing before it's carried out.

casa.ctaEyebrow: Have a plot or a project in mind?
casa.ctaTitulo: Tell us what home you want to build.
casa.ctaSub: We'll tell you what's possible, what permits you need and how long it takes, with no obligation.

contacto.descripcion: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
